chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.378 of 2023 (Professor Doctor Ahmed Ali Brohi and 02 others Versus Province of Sindh and 04 others) __________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Omar Sial Hearing Case (Priority) 1.For order on office objection/ reply at “A” 2.For hearing of main case. 3.For hearing of CMA No.4568/2023 (stay) 28.02.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, Advocate for Appellants Mr. Rajesh Kumar Khagaija, Advocate for Respondent No.3 Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, AAG --------------------------- Learned counsel for the Appellants submits that subsequent to the filing of this appeal, some developments have taken place which have rendered these proceedings infructuous and the Appellants have attempted to avail a remedy by filing a fresh suit and grievance will be taken to a logical end in that referred suit, however, the withdrawal of this Appeal will be without prejudice to the rights of the Appellants. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
